title: Decaying Winter
description: A mod that aims to add items from DW to Minecraft. May also be a QoL mod.
body: This modification aims to incorporate the majority of items found in the game "Decaying Winter" into Minecraft. The mod introduces extra tools, blocks, structures, and items as of now. If, for any reason, you wish to experience the world of "Decaying Winter" within Minecraft, consider giving this modification an attempt. You may also want to try if you want a QoL mod.
